Uses of Package
com.teamMatcha.pos

  • Classes in com.teamMatcha.pos used by com.teamMatcha.pos
    Class
    Description
    CartItem
    Represents an item in the shopping cart.
    Database.InventoryUsageRow
    Represents a row in the inventory usage report.
    Database.MenuIngredientRow
    Represents an ingredient for a menu item.
    Database.PopularItemRow
    Represents a row in the popular items report.
    Database.SalesReportRow
    Represents a row in the sales report.
    Database.StockLevelRow
    Represents a row in the stock level report.
    Database.WeeklyOrdersRow
    Represents a row in the weekly orders report.
    Database.ZReportData
    Represents the data for a full Z-Report.
    Database.ZReportRow
    Represents a row in the Z-Report (employee orders summary).
    Employee
    Represents an employee in the system.
    InventoryItem
    Represents an item in the inventory.
    Product
    Represents a product in the menu.
    XReports
    Represents an X-Report which provides a summary of orders and revenue for a specific hour.
